summary: A Newsmax LIVE remote interview with Labor Secretary Lori Chavez-DeRemer discussing the Project Firewall enforcement initiative and H-1B/visa abuse, with Newsmax chyrons ('LABOR DEPT. INVESTIGATES VISA ABUSE'). It is a straight cable-news interview, not produced entertainment or music-driven, so out of scope.
notable_text: NEWSMAX; Lori Chavez-DeRemer, Secretary of Labor; LABOR DEPT. INVESTIGATES VISA ABUSE
